memoryArtifacts.headline: Berkeley Castle
memoryArtifacts.description:
This is where Sir William Harding De Berkeley De Ardenne lived. Not only is it still standing, it's even still owned by his descendants, in England, today. You can even get married there. How cool would that be? 

The icing on the cake is that the castle even has its own website:

https://www.berkeley-castle.com/

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord William De Berkeley於1226年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊時，他的父親Thomas de Berkeley59歲，母親Joan de Somery36歲。他於1244年與Maud de Berkeley在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1272年1月8日在英國斯塔福爾享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord William De Berkeley于1226年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊时，他的父亲Thomas de Berkeley59岁，母亲Joan de Somery36岁。他于1244年与Maud de Berkeley在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1272年1月8日在英国斯塔福爾享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord William De Berkeley was born in 1226, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de Berkeley, was 59 and his mother, Joan de Somery, was 36. He married Maud de Berkeley in 1244, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 8 January 1272, in Staffordshire, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord William De Berkeley est né en 1226, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Berkeley, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Joan de Somery, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Berkeley en 1244, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 8 janvier 1272, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord William De Berkeley 1226 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Berkeley 59 und seine Mutter Joan de Somery 36. Er hat 1244 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England Maud de Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 8. Januar 1272 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord William De Berkeley è nato il nel 1226 nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas de Berkeley, aveva 59 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Somery, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Berkeley nel 1244, nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 8 gennaio 1272, nel Staffordshire, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Lord William De Berkeley(이)가 1226년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Berkeley(은)는 59세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Somery(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1244년 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 Maud de Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1272년 1월 8일 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord William De Berkeley nasceu em 1226, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Berkeley, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Somery, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Berkeley em 1244, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 8 de janeiro de 1272, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord William De Berkeley родился в 1226 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas de Berkeley было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Somery, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Berkeley в 1244 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 8 января 1272 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord William De Berkeley nació en 1226, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Berkeley, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Joan de Somery, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Maud de Berkeley en 1244, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 8 de enero de 1272, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
